key_learnings: Taste preferences cluster into distinct profiles that predict dietary patterns.
research_findings: Users are 3x more likely to adhere to nutrition plans that align with their flavor preferences.
current_focus_areas: Building collaborative filtering models to predict and adapt to evolving taste preferences.

copilot_assigned_topic: Flavor pairing science and taste adaptation over time
library_bot_note: This bot's name and purpose have not changed. It was designated as a library bot (Bots 1–19) available for departments to access once starrm1 grants approval and issues an access number.
knowledge_accuracy_requirement: All knowledge retained and shared by this bot must be backed by true, accurate, and factual information. Unverified or speculative content is not permitted.
